changes.value: Create the Avatar component and wire avatar display into the field dispatch system. ## New files - `ui/src/components/avatar.tsx` — low-level avatar renderer: data URI image or colored-initials circle - `ui/src/components/fields/displays/avatar-display.tsx` — renders overlapping avatar stack from actor ID array (for assignees field) ## Modified files - `ui/src/components/fields/displays/index.ts` — export AvatarDisplay, add `avatar` to resolveDisplay - `ui/src/components/cells/cell-dispatch.tsx` — add `avatar` case - `ui/src/components/entity-inspector.tsx` — add `avatar` to display dispatch ## Avatar component design - Props: `actorId: string`, `size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg"`, `className?` - Uses `useEntityStore().getEntity("actor", actorId)` to resolve actor - If actor has `avatar` field (data URI): render `` with rounded-full - Fallback: colored circle with initials (first letter of each word in name) - Color from actor's `color` field or deterministic hash ## AvatarDisplay design (for assignees reference field) - `value` is array of actor IDs - Renders row of overlapping `` components - Shows "+N" if more than 3 - Compact/full modes ## Subtasks - [ ] Create Avatar component with image/initials fallback - [ ] Create AvatarDisplay for actor ID arrays - [ ] Wire into resolveDisplay and CellDispatch - [ ] Wire into entity-inspector display dispatch - [ ] Run `npm test`
Avatar component and avatar display type
